facts: The page is a search result for "BENEFIT" on the DOE eXCHANGE platform, listing funding opportunities and teaming partner lists.

DE-FOA-0003514 is a Fiscal Year 2025 Vehicle Technologies Office (VTO) Program Wide Funding Opportunity Announcement (NOFO) issued by Vehicle Technologies (VTO), with dates 4/1/2025 05:00 PM ET to 6/18/2025 05:00 PM ET.

DE-FOA-0003236 is a Platform Technologies for Transformative Battery Manufacturing (FOA) issued by Advanced Materials and Manufacturing Technologies Office (AMMTO), with dates 3/4/2024 05:00 PM ET to 5/7/2024 05:00 PM ET.

DE-FOA-0003120 is a Bipartisan Infrastructure Law (BIL) FY23 BIL Electric Drive Vehicle Battery Recycling and Second Life Applications (FOA) issued by Vehicle Technologies (VTO), with dates 2/7/2024 05:00 PM ET to 4/19/2024 05:00 PM ET.
DE-FOA-0003213 is a Hydrogen and Fuel Cell Technologies Office FOA to Advance the National Clean Hydrogen Strategy (FOA) issued by HFTO, with dates 1/26/2024 05:00 PM ET to 3/22/2024 05:00 PM ET.
DE-FOA-0002922 is a Bipartisan Infrastructure Law: Clean Hydrogen Electrolysis, Manufacturing, and Recycling (FOA) issued by HFTO, with dates 4/19/2023 05:00 PM ET to 7/19/2023 05:00 PM ET.

DE-FOA-0002680 is a Bipartisan Infrastructure Law (BIL) Electric Drive Vehicle Battery Recycling and Second Life Applications (FOA) issued by VTO, with dates 5/31/2022 05:00 PM ET to 7/19/2022 05:00 PM ET.
DE-FOA-0002475 is a Low Greenhouse Gas (GHG) Vehicle Technologies Research, Development, Demonstration and Deployment (FOA) issued by VTO, with dates 5/13/2021 05:00 PM ET to 7/12/2021 05:00 PM ET.
DE-FOA-0002464 is a Supertruck 3 (NOI) issued by VTO, with dates TBD.
